nasb.text: As they were passing by in the morning, they saw the fig tree withered from the roots up.

esv.text: As they passed by in the morning, they saw the fig tree withered away to its roots.

cnv.text: 早晨，他們經過的時候，看見那棵無花果樹連根都枯萎了。

ccb.text: 早上，他们又经过那棵无花果树，看见它连根都枯了。

csbs.text: 清晨，他们路过那棵无花果树的时候，看见它连根都枯萎了。
